document.summary: Mozambique is experiencing a complex humanitarian crisis due to climate-related shocks and armed conflict, impacting health services and increasing disease risks. In April 2026, Health Cluster partners coordinated efforts to deliver essential health services, focusing on mobile clinics and mental health support. The bulletin outlines activities and achievements in response to urgent health needs in both northern and southern regions affected by conflict and floods.
key_takeaways: Mozambique faces a humanitarian crisis from climate shocks and conflict.
Health services are disrupted, increasing risks of waterborne diseases.
Health Cluster partners reached over 409,000 beneficiaries in 18 districts.
Mobile clinics and mental health support are key response strategies.
Significant challenges include access and resource availability.
Ongoing efforts to improve monitoring and reporting mechanisms.
document.why_it_matters: This bulletin highlights the critical health needs in Mozambique and the coordinated response by Health Cluster partners, emphasizing the importance of integrated health services in humanitarian crises.

claims.claim_text: Mozambique is facing a complex humanitarian crisis.
claims.evidence_text: Mozambique continues to face a complex humanitarian crisis characterized by the overlapping impacts of climate-related shocks and armed conflict.
These activities aim to reach 409,968 beneficiaries by the end of the year in 18 districts.

entities.name: Health Cluster
entities.description: A coalition of health partners responding to humanitarian needs in Mozambique.
entities.evidence_text: This bulletin is produced by the Mozambique Health Cluster.

entities.name: Cabo Delgado
entities.description: A province in Mozambique affected by armed conflict.
entities.evidence_text: Insecurity in Cabo Delgado continues to drive displacement.

entities.name: Nampula
entities.description: A province in Mozambique involved in health response activities.
entities.evidence_text: The Health Cluster will address three strategic objectives in Nampula.

entities.name: Niassa
entities.description: A province in Mozambique targeted for health interventions.
entities.evidence_text: 1 district in Niassa province (Mecula) will be addressed.

events.event: Health Cluster activities in response to humanitarian needs.
events.evidence_text: This bulletin provides an overview of the activities and achievements of Health Cluster partners during April 2026.

source_credibility.reason: Produced by the Mozambique Health Cluster, a recognized entity in humanitarian response.
